inputs.label: Number of Lanes
inputs.businessContext: Total number of traffic lanes in one direction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of traffic lanes in one direction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir yöndeki toplam trafik şeridi sayısı.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de voies de circulation dans une direction.

inputs.label: Average Traffic Speed
inputs.businessContext: Average speed of vehicles in the traffic stream.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average speed of vehicles in the traffic stream.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse moyenne des véhicules dans le flux de circulation.

inputs.label: Average Vehicle Length
inputs.businessContext: Typical effective length of a vehicle including safety margin.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical effective length of a vehicle including safety margin.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur effective typique d'un véhicule incluant la marge de sécurité.

inputs.label: Time Headway
inputs.businessContext: Average time gap between consecutive vehicles (time headway).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time gap between consecutive vehicles (time headway).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ardışık araçlar arasındaki ortalama zaman boşluğu (zaman aralığı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher zeitlicher Abstand zwischen aufeinanderfolgenden Fahrzeugen (Zeitlücke).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Intervalle de temps moyen entre véhicules consécutifs (temps de suivi).
